TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chet Allen kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Chet Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors Chet Allen1950 kawas ga Amirika laqi stzwyaw qani. Chet Allen htgan na ryax Chillicothe, Ohio,suru musa beh Columbus, Ohio. 1984 kawas niqun iyu' mhoqil la.
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ƒßet allen kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj *, ¶~ ®ƒßet allen, s~…ïquliq na Œ≤u≈ãe î. (wal mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ï ¶~ ®ƒßet allen**** kawas~…ï …£a amirika laqi s~…ïtzwjaw qani. ¶~ ®ƒßet allen ƒßt…£an na rjax ¶~ ®ƒßilli ¶~ ®otƒße, oƒßio,s~…ïuru mus~…ïa Œ≤eƒß ¶~ ®olumŒ≤us~…ï, oƒßio. **** kawas~…ï niqun iju î mƒßoqil la.
S.FORM: Chet Allen kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Chet Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors Chet Allen1950 kawas ga Amirika laqi stzwyaw qani. Chet Allen htgan na ryax Chillicothe, Ohio,suru musa beh Columbus, Ohio. 1984 kawas niqun iyu' mhoqil la.
